data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for data class/scope references.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the data class/scope references for what was disclosed. However, the evidence provided does not include any records or logs that document these references, leading to an inconclusive status. The linked use case mentions the need for data class/scope references but does not provide any concrete evidence of their existence or functionality.
gaps: No evidence of data class/scope references for what was disclosed.
